prompt: Create an ultra-cinematic vertical fantasy portrait of a Roman warrior taking an extreme action selfie-style shot in the middle of a dusty ancient battlefield at golden sunset. The camera is positioned at the far end of a long spear or lance held toward the viewer, creating a dramatic first-person perspective with the spear dominating the bottom center foreground, heavily motion-blurred and glowing with warm highlights. The warrior is centered behind the spear, wearing ornate bronze-and-leather armor with circular metal fasteners, a deep red cloak, and tousled dark curly hair; leave the face area clean and unobstructed for a later face swap or identity insertion. The scene is chaotic and epic: dust, rocks, and debris explode upward around the body, with distant mountains and a smoky orange sky in the background. Include exactly 8 visible birds of prey or eagles in the sky: 1 huge eagle directly behind and above the warrior with wings spread wide, 1 large eagle at the upper right, 1 dark flying bird near the top center, 1 small bird at the upper left, 1 blurred bird at the left middle, 1 eagle at the lower left with wings open, 1 small silhouette bird near the center-right horizon, and 1 partial eagle at the right edge. Use warm amber sunset lighting, high contrast, shallow depth of field, flying dust particles, cinematic lens flare, realistic textures, dramatic composition, and a heroic ancient-war aesthetic. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio, photorealistic, no text, no watermark.
